notes.post_text: MEGYN KELLY: “Trump is the one who told us he obliterated [Iran’s] nuclear weapons facilities. Pete Hegseth told us that … So f**k you for telling me I'm no longer allowed to believe that. You're the ones who told me that!” https://t.co/O9edYtUZ8L
notes.note_text: FactCheck.org rated Trump's claim of destroying all Iranian nuclear facilities as Exaggerated. Experts and a U.S. intelligence report found the sites were damaged, not obliterated. https://www.factcheck.org/2025/06/iranian-nuclear-program-damaged-not-obliterated-by-u-s-attack/

notes.post_text:
